message:
fix: use wrapper struct for bd mol wisp list JSON output

bd mol wisp list --json returns {"wisps": [...], "count": N}, not a
flat array. The flat-array unmarshal always failed silently, disabling
wisp filtering entirely. Use the wrapper pattern from beads_agent.go.

Fixes getWispIDs introduced in #2049.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
